case_title: SONODA,CHARLOTTE M. VS SCHERMAN,SUSAN A. ESQ.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SONODA,CHARLOTTE M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCHERMAN,SUSAN A. ESQ. NO CONTRACT ESTABLISHED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CIVIL SUBPENA DUCES TECUM TO NICK RECKAS ON FILE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,773.00 FILED BY SONODA,CHARLOTTE M. AS TO DEFENDANT SCHERMAN,SUSAN A. ESQ. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CERTIFIED MAIL TO SUSAN SCHERMAN RETURNED SIGNED.
